design_philosophy: A clean, dense, grocery-first interface (Blinkit) superimposed with a futuristic, multimodal generative AI layer (AAWAZ). Fast scanning, minimal friction, combined with expressive, glowing, animated AI overlays for conversational commerce.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense but clean information hierarchy, mobile-first.

headers.style: sticky top-0 z-40 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-gray-100
headers.details: Must include location selector (left), search bar (center/expanded), and cart (right). Yellow accent for cart.

product_cards.style: bg-white border border-gray-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col justify-between h-full p-3 rounded-2xl
product_cards.details: Image on top, tiny delivery ETA badge, price, and a distinct 'ADD' button. Small typography for weights.

buttons.primary: bg-[#F8CB46] text-black font-semibold hover:bg-[#E5B832] transition-colors rounded-lg px-4 py-2
buttons.ai_floating_mic: fixed bottom-6 right-6 h-16 w-16 bg-black rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(248,203,70,0.4)] border border-gray-800 hover:scale-105 transition-transform z-50 cursor-pointer pointer-events-auto
buttons.add_to_cart: border border-green-600 text-green-700 bg-green-50 hover:bg-green-100 px-3 py-1 rounded text-sm font-bold w-full mt-2 text-center

ai_layer.waveform: Animated glowing yellow/white svg or div bars. Use framer-motion.
ai_layer.glass_panel: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-black/60 border border-white/10 rounded-3xl p-6 text-white shadow-2xl pointer-events-auto
ai_layer.arrows: SVG animated dasharray to draw attention to UI elements.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: -translate-y-1 for product cards, color darkening for buttons.
motion_and_interactions.ai_listening: Pulse animation on the mic button, waveform expanding.
motion_and_interactions.ai_navigating: Screen auto-scrolls to section, target element gets a glowing ring.

hero_background.description: Abstract futuristic voice waveform glowing yellow and white on dark black background
hero_background.usage: Use as background for AI Assistant showcase section or overlay.

hero_shopping.description: Person holding smartphone using voice AI assistant
hero_shopping.usage: Landing page hero image showing the AAWAZ concept.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the UI primarily using Tailwind CSS and raw HTML div structures to match the exact spacing constraints of the Blinkit-style dense grid.
Use Shadcn components for complex interactive state (Dropdowns, Dialogs) but strip their default Vercel-like styles to fit this light, friendly yellow theme.
Include a floating AI mic button (AAWAZ) across the app that triggers an interactive AI state overlay (black translucent, glassmorphism, glowing waveforms).
Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements for testing (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='ai-mic-trigger').
Use framer-motion for the AI assistant's listening waveforms, highlighting pulses, and smooth transitions.
Do not use placeholder image services like via.placeholder.com. Use the provided product image URLs in 'media'.
The typography pair is Outfit (Headings) and Figtree (Body). Do not use Inter.

For the AI Copilot layer, use a side-panel or floating glassmorphic overlay that presents multimodal conversational elements (speech + UI targeting). It should NOT obscure the entire screen permanently.
